## Description

Summary of changes and motivation.

## Type of Change

- [ ] New glossary term(s) added
- [ ] Existing term updated or corrected
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Reference document added/updated
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Related Issue

Closes #(issue number)

## Glossary Checklist (if adding/updating terms)

- [ ] Follows 4-column table format (`English | Primary Tamil Word | Alternative Tamil Words | Notes`)
- [ ] Entries are in English alphabetical order
- [ ] Tamil content is grammatically correct with proper sandhi (புணர்ச்சி)
- [ ] Compound words joined where applicable (ஒற்றுச் சேர்ப்பு)
- [ ] வடசொற்கள் avoided where Tamil alternatives exist
- [ ] சொல்லாய்வு குழு terms marked with `[^1]`
- [ ] Word-root explanations (`a + b + c`) included where possible
- [ ] No duplicate entries

## General Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines
- [ ] I acknowledge the [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] No markdown linting errors

## Additional Notes

Add any additional context here.
